---
title: Templates
description: Multi-scene video templates assembled from primitives with branded transitions
---

Full videos, not single animations. Each template is a thin `<TransitionSeries>` orchestrator that stitches typography primitives, backgrounds, and lightweight scene components into one branded clip. Content is a typed, serializable config — swap the data, keep the motion.
